post.summary: Fetches the segments search list.
post.description:
This API retrieves the segments search list based on the provided request parameters. It allows filtering segments based on various criteria such as search fields, segment ids, provider, price range, and more.

**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. 
| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page. The default value is 100. |
| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. 
| searchKeywordSet `[required if segmentIds not given]` | List of Number | Search keywords to be searched on the 'pathKey' and 'description' of the segments with encoded special characters. |
| segmentIds `[required if searchField not given]` | List of Number | List of segment ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| verticalIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of vertical ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| partnerIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of partner ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| providerIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of provider ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| priceRangeIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of price range ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| reachRangeIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of reach range ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| showOnlyReadySegments `[optional]` | Boolean | Flag to filter segments that are ready. Default is false. |
| showOnlyNonZeroSegments `[optional]` | Boolean | Flag to filter segments that have non-zero reach. Default is false. |

post.summary: Create matched audience - unified endpoint for all verticals and subtypes
post.description:
Unified API endpoint for creating matched audiences across all verticals and subtypes.
     Supports Political, Specialization, and Healthcare (Patient, HCP, Nurse, Non NPI Nurse, Generic) verticals.
     The appropriate processing strategy is selected based on verticalId and subtypeId. audienceRequest
     and file is sent as binary multipart/form-data.

**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
    | audienceName `[required]` | String | Name of the matched audience to be created. Max length 255. |
    | dataPartnerId `[required for few verticals and few subtypes]` | Integer | ID of the data partner associated with the audience. |
    | audienceSubtypeId `[required for subtype specific audience]` | Integer | Subtype ID for Healthcare audiences (e.g., 3 for HCP, 4 for Nurse, 5 for Non NPI Nurse and 6 for Patient). |

    | fileColumnCount `[required]` | Integer | Number of columns in the uploaded file. |
    | columnCombinationId `[required]` | Integer | ID representing the combination of columns used for matching. This represents the mandatory columns that should be provided for audience creation. |
    | consentGiven `[required for Healthcare Patient subtype]` | Boolean | Indicates if consent has been given for patient data usage. |

post.summary: Add new Custom Voter Audience
post.description:
This endpoint will add a new Custom Voter Audience for the advertiser. The audience can be created for specific states or for PAN-USA (all states). The request body should contain the audience name, equation, reach, audience size, and optionally the state IDs for which the audience is to be created.
The equation should be a valid logical expression using the taxonomy IDs of the segments. The user can select different segments in a single group and fetch the data by providing logical relation between them using AND (&) and OR (|) operators. Different groups can be combined using AND (&) and OR (|) operators but in a single group, either only AND (&) operator or only OR (|) operator are allowed. Negation operator (!) can be used before a taxonomy ID to exclude that segment from the audience.

post.summary: Fetch segment details for Custom Voter Audience segment catalogue
post.description:
This endpoint will fetch the segments based on search parameters provided for Custom Voter Audience segment catalogue.
  • If no search parameters are provided then it will fetch all root segments for whole country (currently U.S.) along with their child segments.
  • If state Ids are provided then it will fetch all root segments for those states along with their child segments.
  • If parent segment Id is provided then it will fetch all child segments for that parent segment.
  • If search keywords are provided then it will fetch all leaf segments matching those keywords in column path_key and description.
  • If taxonomy Ids are provided then it will fetch all leaf segments matching those taxonomy Ids. If validateTaxonomyIds flag is true then it will validate all taxonomy Ids exist.
  • If segment Ids are provided then it will fetch those segments.
  • If none of the above criteria is met then it will return empty list.
